response.justification: Strong full-stack software craftsman with ~14 years of professional experience and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators, agentic workflows) at re:cinq. However, the role targets a Director-level individual contributor with 15+ years and recognized AI expertise demonstrated through built products or platforms — the candidate's AI work is recent and not at the depth, scale, or visibility expected for a Principal/Director IC. No evidence of cloud-scale AI platform leadership, strategic advisory experience with executives/customers, or recognized industry presence in AI.
strengths: Broad full-stack experience across web, mobile, embedded, and microservices at high request volumes
Recent hands-on AI-agent infrastructure work (MCP, agentic frameworks) at re:cinq
Founder of an open-source geo-data platform with real-world NGO adoption, showing entrepreneurial drive
concerns: AI expertise is recent and tooling-focused; lacks recognized AI products/platforms expected at Principal level
No demonstrated experience advising strategic customers or operating at Director-level IC scope
Limited cloud-platform strategy depth; cloud exposure is primarily AWS CDK application work, not platform architecture

key_factors.factor: Strategic advisory and Director-level IC scope
